title: Design System: Studennnn — Calm Ledger v2

body.purpose: Default running text. Cap at 65-75ch on prose.

motion.name: spring-curve
motion.purpose: iOS UIView spring — universal across the system.

motion.name: spring-micro
motion.purpose: Button press scale, checkbox toggle, switch thumb.

motion.name: spring-standard
motion.purpose: Tab switch, hover lift, dropdown, chip filter, dialog backdrop fade.

motion.name: spring-large
motion.purpose: Sheet slide-in, modal open, page transition.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: prefers-reduced-motion fallback. NOT instant — 100ms preserves change-happened signal.

glass.name: glass-blur-desktop
glass.purpose: iOS-strength frosted on top nav + sheet backdrop (desktop only).

glass.name: glass-blur-mobile
glass.purpose: Win11-strength frosted on mobile — protects Android GPU.

components.name: Primary Pill Button (System Blue)
components.description: Default action across every role. System Blue pill, white text, inset white-15 top highlight for iOS pressed-glass feel. Hover darkens to #0070EB. Press feedback via .springy.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #ffffff; background: #0a84ff; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15); transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), transform 80ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0070eb; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15), 0 0 0 3px rgba(10,132,255,0.4); }

components.name: Tinted Pill Button (soft blue)
components.description: Soft secondary action. Used for 'ดูทั้งหมด', 'ไปที่ห้องเรียน' — quieter than primary, more visible than ghost.
components.css: .ds-btn-tinted { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #1e40af; background: #eff6ff; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-tinted:hover { background: #dbeafe; }

components.name: Secondary Pill Button (neutral)
components.description: Neutral supporting action. White pill, black text, hairline ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #000000; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transition: box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }

components.name: Default Card (white)
components.description: Default container. White, rounded-2xl, flat resting, lift on hover.
components.html:
รายวิชาที่สอน

คณิตศาสตร์ ม.4 ห้อง ม.4/2
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; transition: box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); }

components.name: Accent Card (saturated system colour)
components.description: Saturated coloured card. Hero CTAs, celebration moments, status banners that need volume. White text. 4 variants: blue / green / orange / red.
components.html:
สวัสดี รายวินทร์

วันนี้คุณมีงาน 3 ชิ้นต้องส่ง
components.css: .ds-card-accent { border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-card-accent--blue { background: #0a84ff; } .ds-card-accent--green { background: #34c759; } .ds-card-accent--orange { background: #ff9500; } .ds-card-accent--red { background: #ff3b30; }

components.name: Tinted Card (subtle system colour)
components.description: Soft tinted callout. KPI by status, info panels. 4 variants matching system colours.
components.html:
ใกล้กำหนดส่ง

3 ชิ้น
components.css: .ds-card-tinted { border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-tinted--blue { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; } .ds-card-tinted--green { background: #ecfdf5; color: #15803d; } .ds-card-tinted--orange { background: #fff7ed; color: #c2410c; } .ds-card-tinted--red { background: #fef2f2; color: #b91c1c; }

components.name: Hero Card (banner + content + inset stats)
components.description: Signature surface. Banner zone (course slot gradient mesh) + white content zone with inset stats strip. Matches the product owner's iOS-profile-card reference image.
components.html:
ป.1/1

ครูประจำชั้น: สมหญิง สุขสันต์

นักเรียน
32
วิชา
8
ครู
5
components.css: .ds-card-hero { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-card-hero:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-card-hero-banner { height: 120px; background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #5eaedb 0%, #3cb4ac 70%); } .ds-card-hero-content { padding: 24px; } .ds-card-hero-title { font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #000000; margin: 0; } .ds-card-hero-subtitle { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); margin: 4px 0 16px; } .ds-panel-inset { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.025); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-panel-inset > div { text-align: center; } .ds-panel-inset dt { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-panel-inset dd { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #000000; margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Input (blue focus glow)
components.description: Rounded-xl field. Hairline ring resting. Focus = blue 2px ring + subtle blue glow (iOS pressed-state). Instant border swap, not sprung.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="กรอกรหัสห้อง" />
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: #000000; transition: box-shadow 100ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-input:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #0a84ff, 0 0 0 4px rgba(10,132,255,0.2); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #0a84ff; } }

components.name: Neutral Badge (role)
components.description: Role badge — neutral grayscale. ADR-0028 keeps this rule from ADR-0014.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: #000000; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Status Badge (system colour tinted)
components.description: Status badge — system colour tinted. 4 variants for ส่งแล้ว / ใกล้กำหนด / เลยกำหนด / ประกาศใหม่.
components.css: .ds-badge--success { background: #ecfdf5; color: #15803d; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(21,128,61,0.15); } .ds-badge--warn { background: #fff7ed; color: #c2410c; } .ds-badge--danger { background: #fef2f2; color: #b91c1c; } .ds-badge--info { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; }

narrative.northStar: Calm Ledger v2 — friendly, layered, smooth
narrative.overview:
Studennnn keeps the chrome discipline of ADR-0014 (off-white body, true black ink, Anuphan single-family, pill geometry, rounded-2xl cards) and adds back the colour and material depth that ADR-0014 stripped out. Chrome stays calm; content carries colour. Interaction borrows the iOS spring curve at three durations and the iOS frosted-glass vocabulary in four named places.

The pain ADR-0028 addresses, verbatim from the product owner: 'ผมต้องการ Layout หรือ ธีมสีโดยรวมให้มันสดใสกว่านี้ เพราะตอนนี้ Project จืดมาก ไม่มีสีสัน.' Solution: System Blue as universal primary action, 8-slot course identity palette, .card-hero with banner + inset stats pattern matching the iOS profile-card reference image.
keyCharacteristics: Off-white body (#F2F2F7 iOS systemGroupedBackground), true black ink, white card surfaces
System Blue (#0A84FF) as universal primary action across every role
4-colour iOS-style system palette (Blue/Green/Orange/Red) for state + status
8-slot course identity palette resolved by hash(class.id) — rose/coral/amber/lime/teal/sky/indigo/violet
Single typeface Anuphan, weight 600 ceiling, negative letter-spacing on display/headline/title
Pill geometry for actions, 2xl for cards, 3xl for .card-hero
Material depth via layered surfaces (.card-hero banner+content split, .panel-inset stats strip)
Frosted glass strictly scoped: top nav, mobile bottom nav, sheet backdrop, hero info bar
iOS spring curve at 3 duration tiers (80/180/280ms), form-focus instant, reduced-motion 100ms ease-out
Role-modulated rendering: student maximum vibrancy, teacher 4px markers + status colours, admin neutral with gallery exception

rules.name: The System-Blue-Is-Action Rule
rules.body: #0A84FF is the primary action across every role. True black is for text and structural strokes. Aubergine is retired.

rules.name: The Course-Colour-Is-Content Rule
rules.body: Course colour appears on content (chips, hero banners, list markers), never on chrome.

rules.name: The Saturation-Distinguishes-Layer Rule
rules.body: System colours sit at higher chroma; course colours at medium chroma. Users read by saturation.

rules.name: The True-Black-For-Text Rule
rules.body: Primary text and headings are #000000 exact. No slate-900, no #1a1a1a.

rules.name: The No-Saturated-Role-Colour Rule
rules.body: Admin/Teacher/Student badges remain neutral grayscale. Role differentiation moves to placement and label.

rules.name: The Anuphan-Only Rule
rules.body: No serif. No second display font.

rules.name: The 600-Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Weight 600 is the heaviest. No weight 700.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section eyebrows stay sentence case 0.875rem weight 500.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting cards have no shadow; rounded-2xl + hairline carry the affordance.

rules.name: The Material-By-Layering Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from stacked surfaces (.card-hero + .panel-inset), not from drop shadow weight.

rules.name: The Glass-Is-Chrome-Only Rule
rules.body: Frosted glass lives on nav, sheet backdrop, hero info bar — never on cards or content surfaces.

rules.name: The Spring-Curve-Is-Universal Rule
rules.body: Single iOS spring curve everywhere — no Material easing, no bouncy elastic.

rules.name: The Form-Focus-Is-Instant Rule
rules.body: Input focus border swaps in 100ms ease-out, never sprung.

rules.name: The Reduced-Motion-Is-Not-Instant Rule
rules.body: 100ms ease-out preserves change-happened signal; instant disorients.

rules.name: The Gallery-Exception Rule
rules.body: List-of-things views (/admin/dashboard class cards, course overviews) get full .card-hero treatment regardless of role default vibrancy.

dos: Do anchor every page in true black text on off-white body (#F2F2F7) or white surface
Do use System Blue (#0A84FF) for all primary actions across every role
Do use course slot colours on content (chips, hero banners, list markers), never on chrome
Do use rounded-full for pills, rounded-2xl for cards, rounded-3xl for .card-hero
Do apply negative letter-spacing on display + headline + title
Do keep weight 600 as the heaviest ceiling
Do layer subordinate surfaces (.panel-inset inside .card-hero) for depth
Do keep frosted glass to the four named places: top nav, mobile bottom nav, sheet backdrop, hero info bar
Do use iOS spring curve at 3 duration tiers; form focus stays instant
Do wrap motion in prefers-reduced-motion: reduce -> 100ms ease-out (not instant)
Do verify body-size text contrast — Green-500 and Orange-500 only support large text in white
Do apply .card-hero to admin dashboard class cards (gallery exception)
donts: Don't use almost-black softening. Primary text is #000000.
Don't use aubergine. ADR-0028 retires it.
Don't use saturated semantic colours for role badges.
Don't use frosted glass on cards, sidebars, data tables, form inputs, or body text containers.
Don't spring a form input focus ring.
Don't add a second display font.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a coloured stripe.
Don't nest cards inside cards — .panel-inset inside .card-hero is a subordinate panel, not a nested card.
Don't put body text on saturated .card-accent Green or Orange.
Don't emulate Windows 11 Mica directly — translate intent to iOS-style frosted glass at lower blur.
